name: IdsDmProdBnfVndrExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_BNF_VNDR AS ( SELECT BNF_VNDR.BNF_VNDR_ID, BNF_VNDR.BNF_VNDR_NM, BNF_VNDR.BNF_VNDR_PHN_NO, BNF_VNDR.BNF_VNDR_PHN_NO_EXT, BNF_VNDR.BNF_VNDR_TYP_CD_SK, BNF_VNDR.BNF_VNDR_SK, COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.BNF_VNDR BNF_VNDR LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON BNF_VNDR.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE BNF_VNDR.BNF_VNDR_SK NOT IN (0,1) ), cte_lookup AS ( SELECT cte_BNF_VNDR.*, COALESCE(CD2.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS TRGT_CD, COALESCE(CD2.TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK') AS TRGT_CD_NM FROM cte_BNF_VNDR LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD2 ON cte_BNF_VNDR.BNF_VNDR_TYP_CD_SK = CD2.CD_MPPNG_SK ), cte_xfrm AS ( SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, BNF_VNDR_ID, BNF_VNDR_NM, BNF_VNDR_PHN_NO, CASE WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(TRGT_CD)) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE TRGT_CD END AS BNF_VNDR_TYP_CD, CASE WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(TRGT_CD_NM)) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE TRGT_CD_NM END AS BNF_VNDR_TYP_NM, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO, BNF_VNDR_PHN_NO_EXT FROM cte_lookup ) SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, BNF_VNDR_ID, BNF_VNDR_NM, BNF_VNDR_PHN_NO, BNF_VNDR_TYP_CD, BNF_VNDR_TYP_NM, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO, BNF_VNDR_PHN_NO_EXT FROM cte_xfrm
